'''鈭歽-th-sh-ch''' ('''kayathshechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voyage|voyage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voyage|voyage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-th-sh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kayathshechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyathshechoko|thiyathshechoko]] || [[word:jiyathshechoko|jiyathshechoko]] || [[word:shiyathshechoko|shiyathshechoko]] || [[word:kiyathshechoko|kiyathshechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyathshechoko|thoyathshechoko]] || [[word:joyathshechoko|joyathshechoko]] || [[word:shoyathshechoko|shoyathshechoko]] || [[word:koyathshechoko|koyathshechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yathshechoko|th忙yathshechoko]] || [[word:j忙yathshechoko|j忙yathshechoko]] || [[word:sh忙yathshechoko|sh忙yathshechoko]] || [[word:k忙yathshechoko|k忙yathshechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayathshechoko|thayathshechoko]] || [[word:jayathshechoko|jayathshechoko]] || [[word:shayathshechoko|shayathshechoko]] || [[word:kayathshechoko|kayathshechoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
